hybrid:keywords:340de95fd0f18a72ada2ce8d.return: {"high_level_keywords": ["Arduino code", "Sensor integration", "Real-time monitoring", "Environmental data", "Alert system"], "low_level_keywords": ["PIR motion sensor", "MQ-2 gas sensor", "D2 pin", "A0 pin", "300 threshold", "Serial Monitor", "2 seconds", "Sensor statuses", "Alert: Motion and Gas Detected!"]}
hybrid:keywords:340de95fd0f18a72ada2ce8d.original_prompt: Write Arduino code to use a PIR motion sensor (OUT to D2) and an MQ-2 gas sensor (A0 to A0). If motion is detected and gas level exceeds a threshold (e.g., 300), print “Alert: Motion and Gas Detected!” to the Serial Monitor. Print all sensor statuses every 2 seconds.
